name: Account Compromise Suspected
description: Internal form for employees who think their work account may have been accessed by someone else. Submissions are treated as high severity by Riggs and routed to the on-call analyst immediately.
title: Report Suspected Account Compromise
intro:
Reporting this is the right move. If something feels wrong with your account — an unexpected login alert, a password reset you didn't request, an MFA prompt at 3am, files moved around — we want to hear about it. You are not in trouble, and you don't need to be certain. Filling this out takes about 4 minutes.

**Important:** after you submit, if you can no longer sign in to your account or you think the attacker still has access, also call IT or Security on the hotline. We will move faster on a phone call than email.
submit_message: Thanks. Security will reach out within 15 minutes. Do not change your password again until we tell you — we may want to capture evidence first. If you get locked out or notice anything new, call the IT hotline.

fields.label: Your email
fields.help: Use a personal or alternate email if you can't currently access your work email.

fields.label: Which account is affected?
fields.help: Your work username, SSO login, or email for the account you think was accessed.

fields.label: What did you notice?
fields.help: Pick everything that applies. If you're not sure, pick anything close.
options: Got a 'new sign-in' or 'unusual activity' alert
Password was changed and I didn't change it
Emails I didn't send are in my Sent folder
Mailbox rules or forwarding I didn't set up
Files moved, renamed, or deleted that I didn't touch
Someone told me they got a weird message from me
sample_value: Got a 'new sign-in' or 'unusual activity' alert

fields.label: When did you first notice?
fields.help: Approximate is fine — we'll line it up with login logs.

fields.label: Any unfamiliar location, device, or browser shown?
fields.help: Copy anything from the alert email or sign-in history page if you can.
fields.placeholder: e.g. Lagos, Nigeria - Firefox on Windows
fields.sample_value: Lagos, Nigeria - Mozilla Firefox on Windows

fields.label: Can you still sign in to the account right now?
fields.help: Tells us how urgently we need to act.

fields.label: Did you do anything already?
fields.help: Be honest — nothing is wrong, we just need to know.

fields.label: Anything else we should know?
fields.help: Optional. Other apps acting weird, any phishing emails recently, anyone else affected.
fields.sample_value: I clicked a Microsoft login link in an email two days ago that looked off. Might be related.

alert_template.title: Suspected account compromise: {{account_username}} reported by {{reporter_email}}
